comments.LineComment: | Input Device Types — ADT for input device classification.
| Input devices determine what dynamic data is available during brush strokes.
| This module defines the categorical types of input devices and stylus

value.value: Electromagnetic resonance, no battery required, up to 8192 levels
Active electrostatic, requires battery, up to 4096 levels
Microsoft Pen Protocol, requires battery, up to 4096 levels
Universal Stylus Initiative, requires battery, up to 4096 levels
Apple proprietary, requires battery, up to 4096 levels
Passive capacitive tip, no pressure or tilt support
Standard mouse, position only, no pressure
Laptop trackpad, may have force touch
Finger on touchscreen, may have force touch
Hand tracking in VR with pinch detection
Analog stick input for brush control
